tasks.label: bot deps sync dotenv
tasks.command: pushd /home/simon/.cache/repos/vscode-memory-leak-finder/packages/bot >/dev/null && npm install --package-lock-only && npm ci && popd >/dev/null

tasks.label: repo quality dotenv
tasks.command: npx prettier --write /home/simon/.cache/repos/vscode-memory-leak-finder/.vscode/tasks.json && npm --prefix /home/simon/.cache/repos/vscode-memory-leak-finder run format && npm --prefix /home/simon/.cache/repos/vscode-memory-leak-finder run lint && npm --prefix /home/simon/.cache/repos/vscode-memory-leak-finder run type-check && rm -f /home/simon/.cache/repos/vscode-memory-leak-finder/.vscode/tasks.json
